title: Completion
description: A logged LLM completion record captured by the Log10 platform.

id.description: The unique identifier for this completion.

organization_id.description: The unique identifier for the organization.

kind.description: The kind of completion: chat messages or a single prompt.

status.description: The lifecycle status of this completion.

tags.description: Tag strings applied to this completion for filtering and task matching.

stacktrace.description: Code location stacktrace captured at inference time.

lineno.description: The line number in the source file.

session_id.description: The session this completion belongs to.

duration.description: Duration of the LLM call in seconds.

failure_kind.description: Category of failure if the completion failed.

failure_reason.description: Human-readable reason for failure if the completion failed.
